strengths: 19+ years of technical versatility across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Full-stack execution capability with TypeScript, multiple languages, databases, Docker, and AWS CDK
Teaching and mentorship demonstrated through workshops, open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts), and community contributions
concerns: No AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI products—critical gap for 'AI Strategy' role with preferred AI/ML degree requirement; recent MCP work is infrastructure support, not AI specialization

No strategic or director-level leadership experience: all roles are individual contributor or staff-level with no evidence of strategic planning, customer advisory, product roadmapping, or organizational influence

Limited cloud platform strategy exposure: AWS experience confined to one tactical pricing optimization role; role requires understanding 'future state of cloud products' and platform-level strategy thinking

key_factors.factor: No AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI products
No strategic or director-level leadership experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled polyglot developer with genuine technical depth, but the role requires director-level strategic leadership in AI—areas where the resume shows no evidence. No AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI products exists despite 'AI Strategy' being core to the position and AI/ML credentials being explicitly preferred. All roles are individual contributor or staff-level with no strategic planning, customer advisory, or product roadmap influence required at director level. Cloud experience is limited to tactical application work. Technical versatility and teaching contributions do not offset the fundamental gaps in AI specialization and strategic leadership required for this director-level position.
